name: ◁ Mini Cheese KunafaSHREDDED PHYLLO STUFFED WITH CHEESE

ingredients.item:
SIMPLE SYRUP
2½ cups (300 g) granulated sugar
Squeeze of fresh lemon juice
ingredients.original:
SIMPLE SYRUP
2½ cups (300 g) granulated sugar
Squeeze of fresh lemon juice

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon rose or orange blossom water (optional)
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon rose or orange blossom water (optional)

ingredients.item:
KUNAFA
11/3 pounds (600 g) high-moisture mozzarella cheese, shredded or cut into small cubes
¾ cup (180 ml) canned thick table cream
ingredients.original:
KUNAFA
11/3 pounds (600 g) high-moisture mozzarella cheese, shredded or cut into small cubes
¾ cup (180 ml) canned thick table cream

ingredients.item: 1 box (16 ounces, or 454 g) frozen kataifi dough (shredded phyllo dough), thawed for 1 hour
ingredients.original: 1 box (16 ounces, or 454 g) frozen kataifi dough (shredded phyllo dough), thawed for 1 hour

ingredients.item: 1 cup (240 ml) unsalted butter, melted, plus 2 tablespoons for greasing
ingredients.original: 1 cup (240 ml) unsalted butter, melted, plus 2 tablespoons for greasing

ingredients.item:
FOR GARNISHING
½ cup (60 g) crushed pistachios
2 tablespoons dried rose petals (optional)
ingredients.original:
FOR GARNISHING
½ cup (60 g) crushed pistachios
2 tablespoons dried rose petals (optional)

ingredients.item: 2 TO MAKE THE SIMPLE SYRUP: In a medium saucepan, combine the sugar and lemon juice with 1¼ cups (300 ml) of water and bring to a boil over high heat. Once boiling, reduce the heat to medium and let simmer for 10 minutes. Remove from the heat, stir in the rose or orange water blossom (if using), and let cool to room temperature.
ingredients.original: 2 TO MAKE THE SIMPLE SYRUP: In a medium saucepan, combine the sugar and lemon juice with 1¼ cups (300 ml) of water and bring to a boil over high heat. Once boiling, reduce the heat to medium and let simmer for 10 minutes. Remove from the heat, stir in the rose or orange water blossom (if using), and let cool to room temperature.

ingredients.item: 3 MEANWHILE, MAKE THE KUNAFAS: In a medium bowl, mix together the mozzarella and cream.
ingredients.original: 3 MEANWHILE, MAKE THE KUNAFAS: In a medium bowl, mix together the mozzarella and cream.

ingredients.item: 4 Break up the kataifi dough using your hands and place it in a food processor. Process for a few seconds until it is broken up into small pieces, at least ¼ inch (6 mm) long. Alternatively, you can shred it on a cutting board using a sharp knife.
ingredients.original: 4 Break up the kataifi dough using your hands and place it in a food processor. Process for a few seconds until it is broken up into small pieces, at least ¼ inch (6 mm) long. Alternatively, you can shred it on a cutting board using a sharp knife.

ingredients.item: 5 Transfer the shredded kataifi dough to a large bowl and pour the melted butter over it. Using your hands, massage the butter into the dough, making sure to saturate every strand.
ingredients.original: 5 Transfer the shredded kataifi dough to a large bowl and pour the melted butter over it. Using your hands, massage the butter into the dough, making sure to saturate every strand.

ingredients.item: 6 Brush the bottoms and sides of a 12-cup muffin pan with butter. Spoon the kataifi into the muffin cups, filling each one about halfway. Using your fingers, flatten the kataifi onto the bottom of each muffin cup, allowing the pastry to also line the edges, creating a small cup shape. Spoon about 1½ tablespoons of the cheese mixture into each muffin cup. Take the remaining kataifi dough and spread it over the cheese, completely covering it and tightly packing it in.
ingredients.original: 6 Brush the bottoms and sides of a 12-cup muffin pan with butter. Spoon the kataifi into the muffin cups, filling each one about halfway. Using your fingers, flatten the kataifi onto the bottom of each muffin cup, allowing the pastry to also line the edges, creating a small cup shape. Spoon about 1½ tablespoons of the cheese mixture into each muffin cup. Take the remaining kataifi dough and spread it over the cheese, completely covering it and tightly packing it in.

ingredients.item: 7 Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, until the outside is deeply golden and crispy. Remove from the oven and carefully flip the muffin tray over onto a large sheet pan to release all the mini kunafas. Immediately drizzle the mini kunafas with most of the simple syrup, covering the entire surface of each one. Reserve a bit of simple syrup for serving.
ingredients.original: 7 Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, until the outside is deeply golden and crispy. Remove from the oven and carefully flip the muffin tray over onto a large sheet pan to release all the mini kunafas. Immediately drizzle the mini kunafas with most of the simple syrup, covering the entire surface of each one. Reserve a bit of simple syrup for serving.

ingredients.item: 8 Garnish with the crushed pistachios and rose petals (if using). Serve on small plates or a large platter with simple syrup on the side.
ingredients.original: 8 Garnish with the crushed pistachios and rose petals (if using). Serve on small plates or a large platter with simple syrup on the side.
